creator: mans0n@gorani.run
text:
Created attachment 215414
patch to fix mips kernel build

This patch fixes the following compile errors:

/build/freebsd/sys/mips/mediatek/mtk_soc.c:415:3: error: use of undeclared identifier 'cpu_model'
                cpu_model[idx] = chipid0_3[idx];
                ^
/build/freebsd/sys/mips/mediatek/mtk_clock.c:126:39: error: variable 'mask' is uninitialized when used here [-Werror,-Wuninitialized]
        if (mtk_sysctl_get(SYSCTL_CLKCFG1) & mask)
                                             ^~~~
/build/freebsd/sys/dev/rt/if_rt.c:314:54: error: cast from 'char **' to 'const char **' must have all intermediate pointers const qualified to be safe [-Werror,-Wcast-qual]
            device_get_unit(dev), "macaddr", (const char **)&var)) {
